creator: coco@executive-computing.de
text:
Bugzillas diff doesn't show the newly added files in the patch, although they're in the patchfile:

files/patch-config.h
files/patch-mkpasswd.c
files/patch-whois.1
files/patch-whois.conf.5

Just as with Bug 191426.  Is that a bug in Bugzilla, or do I need to supply additional flags to 'svn diff' ?
